head_preview_lines: See Appendix A-1 for Analyst Certification, Important Disclosures and Research Analyst Affiliations
Expect EBITDA to be under pressure in FY26
We reinstate our earnings estimates for ADP, which remains Rating
Suspended. We expect traffic growth to remain subdued at 2.3% in FY26
at Paris Airports, broadly in-line with company outlook. Traffic at
International assets like TAV and Amman airports is likely to be pressured
by ongoing geopolitical concerns and could take months to recover.
Management has indicated that Extime SPP will be down YoY reflecting
the challenging retail environment, driven by global slowdown in luxury
demand, unfavorable FX effect (euro appreciation) and traffic-mix impact
(lower pax from Middle East partially offset by higher traffic from long
